subject: Excited to connect at the conference, George Stoyanov
body:
Hi George Stoyanov,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at BINUS University. Would love to swap notes on Ai, Gtm, Revops, Saas, Sales, Marketing, Founder, Investor.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]
